dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4827 IS: Preventing Outages With Enhanced Resilience and Operations Nationwide Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Cornyn (for himself and Mr. Padilla) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources

form.official-title: To reauthorize a program for preventing outages and enhancing the resilience of the electric grid, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Preventing Outages With Enhanced Resilience and Operations Nationwide Act of 2026 or the POWER ON Act of 2026.
Section 40101 of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (42 U.S.C. 18711) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (i)(1), by striking 2026 and inserting 2031; and
in subsection (j), by striking 2022 through 2026 and inserting 2027 through 2031.
